info.name: Unified AI Gateway - Screenshot Flow
info.description: Curated request flow for collecting execution screenshots for the thesis.

request.description: Verify OTP and store the Sanctum token.
Create a client for subsequent API-key screenshots.
Create an API key and store it for gateway requests.
Fund the wallet so billing-related flows are visible.
Create a plan for subscription screenshots.
Create a provider record for administrative screenshots.
Capture a successful gateway request if upstream keys are configured.
